content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes for the default-flow-to-minimal bead. The implementation is correct: `--flow` is now optional in `ProjectCreateArgs` (line 107), the `handle_create` function defaults to `FlowPreset::Minimal` when omitted (line 196), and `--flow standard` explicit override still works (validated by the existing `project_create_succeeds_and_writes_all_canonical_files` test). Test fixtures in bundle.rs, engine.rs, workflow_engine_test.rs, and cli.rs consistently updated `default_flow` from `Standard` to `Minimal`. A new CLI test (`project_create_defaults_to_minimal_flow_without_flag`) validates the default behavior end-to-end including project.toml content. No `unwrap_or(FlowPreset::Standard)` fallbacks remain in production code under `src/`. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
